{{Relic Infobox|Ember Tea|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Strength|2}}
{{R|Ember Tea||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Tea Master|2}} event. After pickup, it will give 2 {{KW|Strength||2}} at the start of the next 5 combats.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Tea Master|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Ember Tea}} option and paying 150 Gold.
